_comment: BASE Pipeline Configuration - Universal settings applied to ALL categories
_description: Risk management, sizing, and quality filter settings shared across all pipelines
_wide_open_comment: MASTER FLAG: when true, all historical-PnL filters are bypassed so raw detector edge can be measured on a 3-year backtest. Disables: trade_quality_gates, apply_setup_filters, _check_validated_combinations, ICT sweep/MSS prerequisite, _validate_htf_trend/premium_discount hard-coded calls in BOS/CHoCH/FVG, event_policy_gate session/expiry policy, news_spike_gate size penalties, directional_bias multipliers, dedupe cooloff. PRESERVED: risk math, exit logic (T1/T2/SL/trailing/EOD), MIS eligibility, timing infrastructure, detector firing conditions themselves. Set to false for normal production operation after 3yr wide-open analysis.

range_compression._comment: From trade_decision_gate.py - Reject during volatility expansion
range_compression._note: Ratio > 0.8 means current ATR is expanding vs avg - bad for level setups. Disabled by default - enable if level setups underperform.

cap_strategy_blocking._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: disabled cap-specific setup blocking
cap_strategy_blocking._evidence: DATA-DRIVEN (Dec 2024): FHM LONG only profitable in mid_cap (+1,342 Rs). large_cap=-8,934 Rs, small_cap=-18,011 Rs, micro_cap=-4,260 Rs
cap_strategy_blocking._note: DISABLED FHM_LONG CAP BLOCKING (Dec 2024): Testing research-based filters (multi-bar confirmation + volume continuation). If FHM still negative after backtest, RE-ENABLE first_hour_momentum_long blocking for micro_cap, small_cap, large_cap.

opening_bell_override._comment: From trade_decision_gate.py lines 443-573 - Opening bell has different volatility patterns
opening_bell_override._evidence: First 15 min has high participation, some gates should be bypassed
opening_bell_override._note: During 9:15-9:30 AM window, bypass specified gates due to opening volatility

price_action_directionality._comment: From trade_decision_gate.py lines 1041-1056 - Validates recent price action aligns with trade direction
price_action_directionality._evidence: Prevents counter-trend entry fills by checking last 3 bars
price_action_directionality._note: Long: close[-1] >= close[-3], Short: close[-1] <= close[-3] - rejects if price moving against intended direction

volatility_sizing._comment: From planner_internal.py lines 547-581 - Van Tharp position sizing

cap_risk_adjustments._comment: From baseline configuration.json (commit 3ded63d) - Van Tharp evidence-based cap sizing with 2.0x ATR for all caps

large_cap._rationale: ALIGNED TO BASELINE: 2.0x ATR based on 6-month MFE/MAE analysis

mid_cap._rationale: ALIGNED TO BASELINE: 2.0x ATR based on 6-month MFE/MAE analysis

small_cap._rationale: ALIGNED TO BASELINE: 2.0x ATR based on 6-month MFE/MAE analysis

micro_cap._rationale: ALIGNED TO BASELINE: 2.0x ATR based on 6-month MFE/MAE analysis (baseline: 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF)

quality_filters._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: disabled quality enforcement (structural_rr, T1_rr thresholds)

strategy_structural_rr_overrides._comment: INSTITUTIONAL FIX: Root cause analysis revealed distance-based R:R is inversely correlated with breakout quality. Breakouts enter AT the level (distance~0), so structural_rr~0 is expected. Use very low thresholds.
strategy_structural_rr_overrides._comment_fhm: FHM uses RVOL-based quality (not ADX*EMA), so structural_rr is calculated differently. Relaxed threshold since FHM entry is at VWAP pullback.

quality_filters._comment_min_t1_rr: DATA-DRIVEN (Dec 2024): Long trades have 0.74R avg MFE. FHM uses T1=1.0R targets for both longs and shorts.
quality_filters._comment_caps: Matched to configuration.json values - original 2%/0.75x was too restrictive

trade_quality_gates._comment: DATA-DRIVEN (Feb 2026): Pipeline-aware A (28,472 trades, 754 sessions, FY2022-26). 13.9 T/day, WR 58.6%, Avg Rs 299, PF 1.81, Total Rs 31.4L. All 4 FYs profitable with growing edge.
trade_quality_gates._wide_open_note: feat/premium-zone-ict-fix: DISABLED for wide-open edge rediscovery (Apr 2026). Evidence was collected on the OLD codebase pre-parity-work, pre-detector-fixes, pre-buffered-logger. Will rebuild from scratch after wide-open 3yr run.
trade_quality_gates._blocked_hours_evidence: hour=10: 9,468 trades removed. Remaining WR 56.5% -> 58.6% after quality gates.

BREAKOUT._evidence: srr>=2.0: best PF 1.30 (inverts above 2.5). t1>=1.75: WR 57.4%. 848 trades, Avg Rs 149, PF 1.47.

REVERSION._evidence: srr>=5.0: PF 1.55, WR 58.1%. t1_rr=1.0 for all (fixed targets). 2,622 trades, Avg Rs 328, PF 1.64.

MOMENTUM._evidence: No data in 3yr backtest. Using BREAKOUT thresholds as fallback.

setup_thresholds._comment: Per-setup overrides. Used for ICT zones in wide-open edge discovery mode — every filter is relaxed so raw detector edge can be measured. Will tighten based on data from deep_edge_analysis/edge_optimizer.

premium_zone_short._note: WIDE-OPEN MODE: floors set to 0.5 (permissive). Features (pdz_range_position, pdz_confluence_count, etc.) flow to trade_report.csv for edge analysis.

late_entry_penalty._comment: RSI penalties DISABLED - need context-aware implementation (see todo.md)
late_entry_penalty._note: RSI penalties disabled in base_pipeline.py. MACD histogram penalty (0.8x) still active.

intraday_gate._comment: From planner_internal.py lines 1031-1056 - Soft intraday gates
intraday_gate._note: RSI penalty disabled. Active penalties: weak_volume (0.8x), adx_out_of_band (0.9x)

planner_precision._comment: From planner_internal.py lines 527-537 - RPS floor protection
planner_precision._note: Floor RPS = max(price * 0.45%, ATR * 0.35) - prevents too-tight stops

universal_ranking._comment: Universal ranking adjustments from ranker.py - apply to ALL categories
universal_ranking._description: Time-of-day filtering, blacklist penalties, RR caps, multi-TF adjustments

time_of_day._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: disabled late-day ranking penalty
time_of_day._audit_finding: 39 signals in 14:00-15:00 window, only 3 trades (7.7% conversion = noise)
time_of_day._note: Multiplier applied to threshold, not score. Higher = harder to qualify.

unrealistic_rr._comment: From ranker.py lines 519-525 - Penalty for unrealistic R:R
unrealistic_rr._note: Unrealistic R:R often indicates bad level placement or data issues

multi_tf_daily._comment: From ranker.py lines 350-399 - Linda Raschke MTF filtering
multi_tf_daily._evidence: Professional traders require HTF alignment for optimal setups
multi_tf_daily._note: ±15% adjustment based on daily regime alignment at confidence ≥ 0.70

multi_tf_hourly._comment: From ranker.py lines 402-447 - Linda Raschke lower TF execution
multi_tf_hourly._evidence: Enter on aligned lower TF for better timing
multi_tf_hourly._note: ±10% adjustment based on hourly session bias at confidence ≥ 0.60

daily_score_weighting._comment: From ranker.py line 505 - Combine daily and intraday scores

blacklist._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: disabled blacklist to test all setups raw
blacklist._description: Blacklisted setups get -999 penalty (effectively blocking them) but still get detected so other detectors can work
blacklist._note: Penalty applied at ranking, not detector init - prevents spillover to other detectors

rsi_dead_zone._comment: GATES-OFF RUN: disabled RSI dead zone filter
rsi_dead_zone._evidence: 101 hard_sl trades in RSI 40-50 = -54,687 loss (43% of ALL hard_sl loss)

_comment_sl_atr_mult: Base SL ATR multiplier - Aligned to OLD configuration.json which uses 1.6x ATR
_comment_atr_fallback: Fallback ATR as percentage of price (0.75%) when ATR indicator unavailable
_comment_sl_ticks: Buffer below structure stop (swing low/high) - from OLD config
_comment_risk: Risk per trade in Rupees - 1% of 1L capital

validated_combinations._comment: Level 2 SELECTIVE: Walk-forward validated whitelist gate (48K trades, 4-tick OHLC, 4 FYs, Feb 2026)
validated_combinations._evidence: deep_edge_analysis.py + filter_simulation.py on 20260215-224737: ~39 trades/day, Rs 1053 avg
validated_combinations._note: V3: sl_atr_mult REMOVED (gate-time approx diverges 3-40x from post-hoc). small_cap cap_rule REMOVED (vol_or<=0.027 passed 66% of all VC passes). unknown:volume_low tightened 418->200. High-volume setups pass ONLY via cap_rules.

setup_rules._comment: Tier 1: Setup-specific IMPROVING/STABLE interactions. OR logic — ANY rule match = pass. Only setups with gate-time-available features.

gap_fill_short.name: all
gap_fill_short._comment: IMPROVING setup — all trades have positive edge

gap_fill_long.name: all
gap_fill_long._comment: IMPROVING setup — all trades have positive edge

premium_zone_short.name: wide_open
premium_zone_short._note: WIDE-OPEN MODE: unconditional pass for edge discovery. Features (pdz_has_mss_confluence, pdz_has_fvg_confluence, pdz_has_ob_confluence, pdz_htf_bullish, pdz_range_position, etc.) flow into trade_report.csv via plan.extras — use deep_edge_analysis.py / edge_optimizer.py to find which combinations have edge, then add rules here.

discount_zone_long.name: wide_open
discount_zone_long._note: WIDE-OPEN MODE: unconditional pass. See premium_zone_short note.

cap_rules._comment: Tier 2: Cap-segment global filters. range_bounce_short, premium_zone_short, etc. pass ONLY through these. small_cap REMOVED (vol_or<=0.027 passed 316/475 = 66% of all VC passes on test day — too permissive).

unknown.name: volume_low
unknown._edge: tightened from 418 (LOW tercile) to 200 — unknown-cap stocks often have missing pd_range data, need stricter filter
